name: Shilajit Extract
summary: Shilajit Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Mitochondrial Health; Hormonal Health; Energy Metabolism. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Mitochondrial Support; Hormonal Signaling Context, not treatment claims.
